title: MTA Sts
helpOutput:
Usage: mta-sts [<options>] <domain>

  Look up and validate MTA-STS policy for a domain.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <domain>  Domain name to look up MTA-STS for
output:
{
  "Domain": "google.com",
  "MTA-STS Record": "v\u003dSTSv1; id\u003d20210803T010101;",
  "Version": "STSv1",
  "ID": "20210803T010101",
  "TTL": "300s",
  "Policy URL": "https://mta-sts.google.com/.well-known/mta-sts.txt",
  "Policy Status": "Found (HTTP 200)",
  "Policy Version": "STSv1",
  "Mode": "enforce (require TLS)",
  "MX Patterns": "smtp.google.com, aspmx.l.google.com, *.aspmx.l.google.com",
  "Max Age": "86400s (1d)"
}
